message:
chore: track .cargo/config.toml with 16MB stack for debug/test builds

The ft CLI command tree overflows the default 8MB stack in debug/test
builds for some clap parser unit tests. Track the Cargo config that
sets RUST_MIN_STACK=16777216 (16MB) so all developers and CI get the
same stack size without manual setup.

- .cargo/config.toml: set RUST_MIN_STACK env via [env] table
- .gitignore: stop ignoring .cargo/config.toml; update comment to
  note the tracked config and suggest per-agent override files for
  machine-local adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# The ft CLI command tree still overflows the default 8MB stack in debug/test
+# builds for some clap parser unit tests. 16MB is sufficient for those cases.
+[env]
+RUST_MIN_STACK = "16777216"

@@ -4,8 +4,8 @@ target-*/
 **/*.rs.bk
 Cargo.lock.bak
 
-# Local Cargo overrides (use .cargo/config.toml.example as template)
-.cargo/config.toml
+# Tracked Cargo config lives in .cargo/config.toml; use the example/template
+# and extra per-agent override files for machine-local adjustments.
 
 # IDE and editor files
 .idea/
